user.title: vSphere Connection
user.description: Enter your vCenter or ESXi host credentials.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your vCenter or ESXi server
data_description.username: For vCenter use user@domain.com format. For ESXi use local account name (e.g., root)

data_description.verify_ssl: Enable to verify the server's SSL certificate. Disable for self-signed certificates
data_description.ssl_ca_path: Path to a PEM-encoded CA certificate file on the HA host (e.g., /ssl/vsphere-ca.pem). Only needed with a private/internal CA

categories.title: Monitoring Categories
categories.description: Select which vSphere objects and features to monitor.

data_description.hosts: Monitor ESXi host CPU, memory, uptime, and power state
data_description.vms: Monitor virtual machine resources, snapshots, and guest info

data_description.clusters: Monitor DRS and HA cluster status
data_description.network: Monitor vSwitch, port group, and physical NIC status
data_description.storage_advanced: Per-VM disk and storage policy details
data_description.events_alarms: vSphere alarm tracking and HA event notifications
data_description.perf_interval: How often to poll performance metrics. Lower values increase API load. Minimum 1 minute, maximum 1 hour

entity_selection.title: {category} Selection
entity_selection.description: Select specific {category} to monitor. Leave the list empty to monitor all {category}, including any added in the future.

data_description.selected_objects: Leave empty to monitor all (including future additions)

setup_restrictions.title: Operation Restrictions
setup_restrictions.description: Would you like to configure operation restrictions? You can block specific actions on hosts or VMs to prevent accidental operations.

data_description.configure_restrictions: You can always configure restrictions later in the integration options

menu_option_descriptions.restrictions: Block categories of operations across all hosts and VMs
menu_option_descriptions.vm_select: Block specific actions on individual VMs
menu_option_descriptions.host_select: Block specific actions on individual hosts

restrictions.title: Global Operation Restrictions
restrictions.description: Block categories of operations across all hosts and VMs.

data_description.block_destructive: Blocks: power off, shutdown, hard reset, and snapshot removal
data_description.block_host_ops: Blocks: host shutdown, reboot, maintenance mode, and power policy changes

vm_select.title: Select VM
vm_select.description: Choose a virtual machine to configure restrictions for.

data_description.vm_to_restrict: Select a VM to add or edit restrictions on

vm_actions.title: Restrictions for {vm_name}
vm_actions.description: Select which actions to block on this VM. Deselect all to remove restrictions.

data_description.vm_blocked_actions: Selected actions will be blocked on this VM

host_select.title: Select Host
host_select.description: Choose an ESXi host to configure restrictions for.

data_description.host_to_restrict: Select a host to add or edit restrictions on

host_actions.title: Restrictions for {host_name}
host_actions.description: Select which actions to block on this host. Deselect all to remove restrictions.

data_description.host_blocked_actions: Selected actions will be blocked on this host

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your vCenter or ESXi server
data_description.username: For vCenter use user@domain.com format. For ESXi use local account name (e.g., root)

data_description.verify_ssl: Enable to verify the server's SSL certificate. Disable for self-signed certificates
data_description.ssl_ca_path: Path to a PEM-encoded CA certificate file on the HA host. Only needed with a private/internal CA

error.ca_not_found: CA certificate file not found at the specified path

abort.already_configured: This vSphere host is already configured

menu_option_descriptions.categories: Enable or disable monitoring categories and set polling intervals
menu_option_descriptions.entity_selection_start: Choose which specific hosts, VMs, and datastores to monitor
menu_option_descriptions.restrictions_menu: Block specific actions on individual hosts and VMs
